sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ خَالِدٌ دَوْرَةً تَدْرِيبِيَّةً لِتَطْوِيرِ مَهَارَاتِ الْقِيَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid je prisustvovao obuci za razvoj vještina vođenja.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid attended a training course to develop leadership skills.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ كَيْفِيَّةَ إِدَارَةِ الْمَشَارِيعِ الصَّغِيرَةِ بِنَجَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je kako uspješno upravljati malim projektima.
sentences.translationEn: He learned how to manage small projects successfully.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُدَرِّبُ يَشْرَحُ الدُّرُوسَ بِأُسْلُوبٍ بَسِيطٍ وَوَاضِحٍ.
sentences.translation: Trener je objašnjavao lekcije na jednostavan i jasan način.
sentences.translationEn: The trainer was explaining the lessons in a simple and clear style.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ يَشْعُرُ خَالِدٌ بِالْجَاهِزِيَّةِ لِتَوَلِّي مَنْصِبٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada se Khalid osjeća spremnim za preuzimanje nove pozicije.
sentences.translationEn: Now Khalid feels ready to take on a new position.
